evals.prompt: Create a release checklist for deploying v2.0 of our backend API to production. It includes database migrations and a new Redis cache.
evals.expected_output: Comprehensive release checklist tailored for a backend deployment with DB migrations.
expectations: Includes Pre-Deployment, Deployment, and Post-Deployment phases
Specific steps for database migration backups and execution
Specific steps for verifying the new Redis cache
Includes a clear rollback plan (especially handling DB changes)

evals.prompt: We are launching a new mobile app (iOS and Android) next week. What's the go-to-market and technical release checklist?
evals.expected_output: Release checklist covering mobile app store submissions and backend readiness.
expectations: Covers App Store / Google Play submission review times and metadata
Has a section for post-launch monitoring of crash rates
